name: phanee
css: .phanee-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f0c29, #302b63, #24243e); overflow: hidden; } .phanee-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(120, 80, 255, 0.35) 0%, transparent 70%); animation: phanee-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes phanee-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); } } .phanee-text { position: relative; font-family: 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 4rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: lowercase; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #a78bfa, 0 0 30px #7c3aed, 0 0 60px #4c1d95; animation: phanee-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate; z-index: 2; } @keyframes phanee-glow { from { text-shadow: 0 0 10px #a78bfa, 0 0 30px #7c3aed, 0 0 60px #4c1d95; } to { text-shadow: 0 0 20px #c4b5fd, 0 0 50px #8b5cf6, 0 0 90px #6d28d9; } } .phanee-sparkles { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .phanee-sparkles span { position: absolute; color: #c4b5fd; font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 2vw, 1rem); animation: phanee-float 4s ease-in-out infinite; opacity: 0; } .phanee-sparkles span:nth-child(1) { top: 15%; left: 10%; animation-delay: 0s; } .phanee-sparkles span:nth-child(2) { top: 70%; left: 20%; animation-delay: 0.8s; } .phanee-sparkles span:nth-child(3) { top: 25%; left: 80%; animation-delay: 1.6s; } .phanee-sparkles span:nth-child(4) { top: 75%; left: 75%; animation-delay: 2.4s; } .phanee-sparkles span:nth-child(5) { top: 50%; left: 50%; animation-delay: 3.2s; } @keyframes phanee-float { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(0) scale(0.5); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-12px) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-24px) scale(0.5); } }
